attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
	MFOM_SOB.BATCH_ID,
	MFOM_SOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT,
	MFOM_SOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME,
	MFOM_SOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_SHORT_NAME,
	MFOM_SOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_DESCRITPION,
	MFOM_SOB.ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY_POST_FLAG,
	MFOM_SOB.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,
	MFOM_SOB.CURRENCY_CODE,
	MFOM_SOB.GLOBAL_NAME,
	MFOM_SOB.CREATE_DATETIME,
	MFOM_SOB.ACTION_CODE,
	MFOM_SOB.EXCEPTION_TYPE,
	MFOM_SOB.MRC_SOB_TYPE_CODE,
	MFOM_SOB.ATTRIBUTE1
FROM	(

/*	SELECT 
		SMGSOB.BATCH_ID,
		SMGSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT,
		SMGSOB.NAME SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME,
		SMGSOB.SHORT_NAME SET_OF_BOOKS_SHORT_NAME,
		SMGSOB.DESCRIPTION SET_OF_BOOKS_DESCRITPION,
		SMGSOB.ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY_POST_FLAG,
		SMGSOB.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,
		SMGSOB.CURRENCY_CODE,
		SMGSOB.GLOBAL_NAME,
		SMGSOB.CREATE_DATETIME,
		SMGSOB.ACTION_CODE,
		'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
		SMGSOB.MRC_SOB_TYPE_CODE,
		'Y' ATTRIBUTE1
	FROM
	$$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_SETS_OF_BOOKS SMGSOB
 	WHERE SMGSOB.GLOBAL_NAME = 'US'
	UNION ALL         */                                       /* Removed as part of SJPROD Q1FY14 */
	
SELECT 
		SMGL.BATCH_ID,
		SMGL.LEDGER_ID BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT,
		SMGL.NAME SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME,
		SMGL.SHORT_NAME SET_OF_BOOKS_SHORT_NAME,
		SMGL.DESCRIPTION SET_OF_BOOKS_DESCRITPION,
		SMGL.ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY_POST_FLAG,
		SMGL.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,
		SMGL.CURRENCY_CODE,
		SMGL.GLOBAL_NAME,
		SMGL.CREATE_DATETIME,
		SMGL.ACTION_CODE,
		'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
			CASE
         			When ELGLR.TARGET_LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE ='PRIMARY'
         			            THEN 'P'
		            WHEN ELGLR.TARGET_LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE  IN ('SECONDARY','ALC')
         			             THEN 'R'
		            WHEN ELGLR.TARGET_LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE ='NONE'
			                     THEN 'N'
		     END MRC_SOB_TYPE_CODE	,	
	 COALESCE (SMGL.ATTRIBUTE1,'N') as ATTRIBUTE1
	FROM
	$$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS SMGL,
	$$ETLVWDB.EL_GL_LEDGER_RELATIONSHIPS ELGLR 
  	WHERE 
	         SMGL.LEDGER_ID = ELGLR.PRIMARY_LEDGER_ID
			   AND  SMGL.GLOBAL_NAME=ELGLR.GLOBAL_NAME
                          AND  SMGL.NAME=ELGLR.TARGET_LEDGER_NAME 
                           AND  ELGLR.RELATIONSHIP_TYPE_CODE <>'ALC' 
			   AND SMGL.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BE'  
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 
		SOGSOB.BATCH_ID,
		SOGSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT,
		SOGSOB.NAME SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME,
		SOGSOB.SHORT_NAME SET_OF_BOOKS_SHORT_NAME,
		SOGSOB.DESCRIPTION SET_OF_BOOKS_DESCRITPION,
		SOGSOB.ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY_POST_FLAG,
		SOGSOB.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,
		SOGSOB.CURRENCY_CODE,
		SOGSOB.GLOBAL_NAME,
		SOGSOB.CREATE_DATETIME,
		SOGSOB.ACTION_CODE,
		'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
		SOGSOB.MRC_SOB_TYPE_CODE,
		'Y' ATTRIBUTE1
	FROM
	$$STGDB.ST_OM_GL_SETS_OF_BOOKS SOGSOB) MFOM_SOB
WHERE	(
	NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV NICTV
		WHERE MFOM_SOB.CURRENCY_CODE = NICTV.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE
		  AND NICTV.END_TV_DATE=16000101)
	OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS NCOA
		WHERE MFOM_SOB.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID = NCOA.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT)
	OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		WHERE MFOM_SOB.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
	)

SELECT   RANK () OVER (ORDER BY SMOGSB.NAME,SMOGSB.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) + MAX_VAL SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
SMOGSB.NAME, SMOGSB.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
FROM
( SELECT SINT.NAME, NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
FROM 
(
      /*  SELECT NAME, GLOBAL_NAME
      FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_SETS_OF_BOOKS SMGSOB
      WHERE SMGSOB.GLOBAL_NAME = 'US'
      UNION      */                                            /* Removed as part of SJPROD Q1FY14 */
	  
    	 SELECT NAME, GLOBAL_NAME
    	 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_GL_SETS_OF_BOOKS
    	  UNION
     	 SELECT NAME,GLOBAL_NAME
     	 FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS SMGL
	WHERE SMGL.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BE'
		UNION
	SELECT NAME,GLOBAL_NAME
     	 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS SCGL
	      ) SINT,
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
 WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SINT.GLOBAL_NAME) SMOGSB,
     (SELECT COALESCE (MAX (SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL
        FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SET_OF_BOOKS) SSOB
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
          FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SET_OF_BOOKS SSOB
         WHERE SSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME = SMOGSB.NAME
           AND SSOB.SS_CODE = SMOGSB.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)

SELECT
TVOUTPUT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
TVOUTPUT.BATCH_ID, 
TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT START_DATE_ACTIVE,
TVOUTPUT.ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY_POST_FLAG,
TVOUTPUT.SET_OF_BOOKS_DESCRIPTION,
TVOUTPUT.SET_OF_BOOKS_SHORT_NAME,
TVOUTPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME,
TVOUTPUT.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT,
TVOUTPUT.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
TVOUTPUT.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT,
TVOUTPUT.SS_CODE,
COALESCE(MAX(TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT - INTERVAL '1' DAY) OVER 
(PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
ORDER	BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT ASC ROWS BETWEEN 1
FOLLOWING
	AND	1 FOLLOWING), DATE '3500-01-01') AS  END_DATE_ACTIVE,
TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE,
ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY ORDER	BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT ASC) AS RANK_INDEX,
(
		CASE
			WHEN	RANK_INDEX = 1
	And	NSOBTV.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY IS NOT NULL 
THEN 'U'
			ELSE	'I' END) As DML_TYPE
,TVOUTPUT.MRC_SOB_TYPE_CODE AS   MULTIREPORTING_CURRNCY_TYPE_CD
,TVOUTPUT.PUSH_TO_GLBL_CONSOL_BOOKS_FLG  /* added in Q4FY11 */
FROM
(
	SELECT	
	SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
	BATCH_ID,
	START_TV_DT,
	BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME,
	SET_OF_BOOKS_SHORT_NAME,
	SET_OF_BOOKS_DESCRIPTION,
	ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY_POST_FLAG,
	BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT,
	FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
	SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT,
	SS_CODE,
	EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
	ACTION_CODE,
	EXCEPTION_TYPE,
	ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
	TVINPUT.SET_OF_BOOKS_SHORT_NAME,TVINPUT.SET_OF_BOOKS_DESCRIPTION,TVINPUT.ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY_POST_FLAG,
	TVINPUT.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT,TVINPUT.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,TVINPUT.MRC_SOB_TYPE_CODE,TVINPUT.PUSH_TO_GLBL_CONSOL_BOOKS_FLG
	ORDER	BY EDW_CREATE_DATETIME DESC) 
	AS ROW_NUM	    ,
	MRC_SOB_TYPE_CODE,
	PUSH_TO_GLBL_CONSOL_BOOKS_FLG  /* added in Q4FY11 */
	FROM
	(    
		/*  SELECT
			SSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
			SMGSOB.BATCH_ID,
			CAST(SMGSOB.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DT,
			SMGSOB.NAME BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME,
			SMGSOB.SHORT_NAME SET_OF_BOOKS_SHORT_NAME,
			SMGSOB.DESCRIPTION SET_OF_BOOKS_DESCRIPTION,
			SMGSOB.ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY_POST_FLAG ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY_POST_FLAG,
			SMGSOB.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT,
			SMGSOB.CURRENCY_CODE FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
			SMGSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT,
			NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE,
			SMGSOB.CREATE_DATETIME EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
			SMGSOB.ACTION_CODE,
			'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
			SMGSOB.MRC_SOB_TYPE_CODE,
			'Y' as PUSH_TO_GLBL_CONSOL_BOOKS_FLG           /* added in Q4FY11 */   /*
		FROM	 $$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_SETS_OF_BOOKS SMGSOB 
			,$$ETLVWDB.SM_SET_OF_BOOKS  SSOB
			,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS NCOA
			,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV NIC
			,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		WHERE	SMGSOB.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID = NCOA. BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT
	AND	SMGSOB.CURRENCY_CODE = NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE
	AND	SMGSOB.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND	NIC.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
	AND	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SSOB.SS_CODE
	AND	SMGSOB.NAME=SSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
	AND         SMGSOB.GLOBAL_NAME = 'US'
UNION	ALL  */                                                     /* Removed as part of SJPROD Q1FY14 */





SELECT
			SSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
			SMGL.BATCH_ID,
			CAST(SMGL.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DT,
			SMGL.NAME BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME,
			SMGL.SHORT_NAME SET_OF_BOOKS_SHORT_NAME,
			SMGL.DESCRIPTION SET_OF_BOOKS_DESCRIPTION,
			SMGL.ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY_POST_FLAG ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY_POST_FLAG,
			SMGL.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT,
			SMGL.CURRENCY_CODE FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
			SMGL.LEDGER_ID SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT,
			NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE,
			SMGL.CREATE_DATETIME EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
			SMGL.ACTION_CODE,
			'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
			CASE
         			When ELGLR.TARGET_LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE ='PRIMARY'
         			            THEN 'P'
		            WHEN ELGLR.TARGET_LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE  IN ('SECONDARY','ALC')
         			             THEN 'R'
		            WHEN ELGLR.TARGET_LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE ='NONE'
			                     THEN 'N'
		     END MRC_SOB_TYPE_CODE,
			 COALESCE (SMGL.ATTRIBUTE1,'N') as PUSH_TO_GLBL_CONSOL_BOOKS_FLG
		FROM	 
		         $$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS SMGL
			    ,$$ETLVWDB.EL_GL_LEDGER_RELATIONSHIPS ELGLR 
			    ,$$ETLVWDB.SM_SET_OF_BOOKS  SSOB
			    ,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS NCOA
			    ,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV NIC
			    ,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		WHERE	SMGL.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID = NCOA. BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT
	           AND	SMGL.CURRENCY_CODE = NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE
	           AND	NIC.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
			   AND	SMGL.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
               AND  SMGL.LEDGER_ID = ELGLR.PRIMARY_LEDGER_ID
			   AND  SMGL.GLOBAL_NAME=ELGLR.GLOBAL_NAME
                           AND  SMGL.NAME=ELGLR.TARGET_LEDGER_NAME 
                           AND  ELGLR.RELATIONSHIP_TYPE_CODE <>'ALC' 
	           AND	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SSOB.SS_CODE
	           AND	SMGL.NAME=SSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
 	           AND  SMGL.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BE'

UNION	ALL
SELECT
			SSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
			SCGL.BATCH_ID,
			CAST(SCGL.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DT,
			SCGL.NAME BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME,
			SCGL.SHORT_NAME SET_OF_BOOKS_SHORT_NAME,
			SCGL.DESCRIPTION SET_OF_BOOKS_DESCRIPTION,
			SCGL.ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY_POST_FLAG                  ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY_POST_FLAG,
			SCGL.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT,
			SCGL.CURRENCY_CODE FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
			SCGL.LEDGER_ID SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT,
			NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE,
			SCGL.CREATE_DATETIME EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
			SCGL.ACTION_CODE,
			'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
			CASE
         			When ELGLR.TARGET_LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE ='PRIMARY'
         			            THEN 'P'
		            WHEN ELGLR.TARGET_LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE  IN ('SECONDARY','ALC')
         			             THEN 'R'
		            WHEN ELGLR.TARGET_LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE ='NONE'
			                     THEN 'N'
		     END MRC_SOB_TYPE_CODE,
			 COALESCE (SCGL.ATTRIBUTE1,'N') as PUSH_TO_GLBL_CONSOL_BOOKS_FLG
		FROM	 
		         $$STGDB.ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS SCGL
			    ,$$ETLVWDB.EL_GL_LEDGER_RELATIONSHIPS ELGLR 
			    ,$$ETLVWDB.SM_SET_OF_BOOKS  SSOB
			    ,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS NCOA
			    ,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV NIC
			    ,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		WHERE	SCGL.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID = NCOA. BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT
	           AND	SCGL.CURRENCY_CODE = NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE
	           AND	NIC.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
			   AND	SCGL.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
               AND  SCGL.LEDGER_ID = ELGLR.PRIMARY_LEDGER_ID
			   AND  SCGL.GLOBAL_NAME=ELGLR.GLOBAL_NAME
                           AND  SCGL.NAME=ELGLR.TARGET_LEDGER_NAME 
                           AND  ELGLR.RELATIONSHIP_TYPE_CODE <>'ALC' 
	           AND	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SSOB.SS_CODE
	           AND	SCGL.NAME=SSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
	           
	           UNION	ALL
	           
    SELECT
			SSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
			ECGL.BATCH_ID,
			CAST(ECGL.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DT,
			ECGL.NAME BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME,
			ECGL.SHORT_NAME SET_OF_BOOKS_SHORT_NAME,
			ECGL.DESCRIPTION SET_OF_BOOKS_DESCRIPTION,
			ECGL.ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY_POST_FLAG                  ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY_POST_FLAG,
			ECGL.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT,
			ECGL.CURRENCY_CODE FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
			ECGL.LEDGER_ID SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT,
			NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE,
			ECGL.CREATE_DATETIME EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
			ECGL.ACTION_CODE,
			'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
			CASE
         			When ELGLR.TARGET_LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE ='PRIMARY'
         			            THEN 'P'
		            WHEN ELGLR.TARGET_LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE  IN ('SECONDARY','ALC')
         			             THEN 'R'
		            WHEN ELGLR.TARGET_LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE ='NONE'
			                     THEN 'N'
		     END MRC_SOB_TYPE_CODE,
			 COALESCE (ECGL.ATTRIBUTE1,'N') as PUSH_TO_GLBL_CONSOL_BOOKS_FLG
		FROM	 
		         $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_GL_LEDGERS ECGL
			    ,$$ETLVWDB.EL_GL_LEDGER_RELATIONSHIPS ELGLR 
			    ,$$ETLVWDB.SM_SET_OF_BOOKS  SSOB
			    ,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS NCOA
			    ,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV NIC
			    ,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		WHERE	ECGL.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID = NCOA. BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT
	           AND	ECGL.CURRENCY_CODE = NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE
	           AND	NIC.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
			   AND	ECGL.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
               AND  ECGL.LEDGER_ID = ELGLR.PRIMARY_LEDGER_ID
			   AND  ECGL.GLOBAL_NAME=ELGLR.GLOBAL_NAME
                           AND  ECGL.NAME=ELGLR.TARGET_LEDGER_NAME 
                           AND  ELGLR.RELATIONSHIP_TYPE_CODE <>'ALC' 
	           AND	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SSOB.SS_CODE
	           AND	ECGL.NAME=SSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
 	         
	UNION	ALL
		SELECT
			SSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
			SOGSOB.BATCH_ID,
			CAST(SOGSOB.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DT,
			SOGSOB.NAME BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME,
			SOGSOB.SHORT_NAME SET_OF_BOOKS_SHORT_NAME,
			SOGSOB.DESCRIPTION SET_OF_BOOKS_DESCRIPTION,
			SOGSOB.ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY_POST_FLAG ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY_POST_FLAG,
			SOGSOB.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT,
			SOGSOB.CURRENCY_CODE FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
			SOGSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT,
			NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE,
			SOGSOB.CREATE_DATETIME EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
			SOGSOB.ACTION_CODE,
			'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
			SOGSOB.MRC_SOB_TYPE_CODE,
			'Y' as PUSH_TO_GLBL_CONSOL_BOOKS_FLG
		FROM	 $$STGDB.ST_OM_GL_SETS_OF_BOOKS SOGSOB 
			,$$ETLVWDB.SM_SET_OF_BOOKS  SSOB
			,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS NCOA
			,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV NIC
			,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		WHERE	 SOGSOB. CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID = NCOA. BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT
	AND	SOGSOB.CURRENCY_CODE = NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE
	AND	SOGSOB.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND	NIC.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
	AND	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SSOB.SS_CODE
	AND	SOGSOB.NAME=SSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
	UNION	ALL
		SELECT
			SSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
			EXMGSB.BATCH_ID,
			CAST(EXMGSB.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DT,
			EXMGSB.NAME BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME,
			EXMGSB.SHORT_NAME SET_OF_BOOKS_SHORT_NAME,
			EXMGSB.DESCRIPTION SET_OF_BOOKS_DESCRIPTION,
			EXMGSB.ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY_POST_FLAG,
			EXMGSB.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT,
			EXMGSB.CURRENCY_CODE FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
			EXMGSB.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT,
			NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE,
			EXMGSB.CREATE_DATETIME EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
			EXMGSB.ACTION_CODE,
			EXMGSB.EXCEPTION_TYPE,
			EXMGSB.MRC_SOB_TYPE_CODE,
			EXMGSB.ATTRIBUTE1 PUSH_TO_GLBL_CONSOL_BOOKS_FLG
		FROM	 $$EXCEPDB.EX_MF_OM_GL_SETS_OF_BOOKS EXMGSB
			,$$ETLVWDB.SM_SET_OF_BOOKS  SSOB
			,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV NIC
			,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS NCOA
			,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		WHERE	EXMGSB. CURRENCY_CODE = NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE
	AND	EXMGSB.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID = NCOA.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT
	AND	EXMGSB.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND	NIC.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
	AND	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SSOB.SS_CODE
	AND	EXMGSB.NAME=SSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
	UNION	ALL
			SELECT
			NSOBT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
			-999 BATCH_ID,
			NSOBT.START_TV_DT,
			NSOBT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME,
			NSOBT.SET_OF_BOOKS_SHORT_NAME,
			NSOBT.SET_OF_BOOKS_DESCRIPTION,
			NSOBT.ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY_POST_FLAG,
			NSOBT.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT,
			NSOBT.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
			NSOBT.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT,
			NSOBT.SS_CODE,
			NSOBT.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
			'X' ACTION_CODE,
			'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
            NSOBT.MULTIREPORTING_CURRNCY_TYPE_CD,
			PUSH_TO_GLBL_CONSOL_BOOKS_FLG
		FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS_TV NSOBT
		 INNER JOIN	$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON	NSOBT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
		WHERE	(NSOBT.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT,NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME) IN 
			(
/* SELECT	SMGSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,SMGSOB.GLOBAL_NAME
FROM	$$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_SETS_OF_BOOKS SMGSOB
WHERE SMGSOB.GLOBAL_NAME = 'US'
UNION  */                                                            /* Removed as part of SJPROD Q1FY14 */

SELECT	SMGL.LEDGER_ID,SMGL.GLOBAL_NAME
FROM	$$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS SMGL
WHERE SMGL.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BE'
UNION
SELECT SCGL.LEDGER_ID,SCGL.GLOBAL_NAME
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS SCGL
UNION
SELECT ECGL.LEDGER_ID,ECGL.GLOBAL_NAME
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_GL_LEDGERS ECGL
UNION
SELECT	SOGSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,SOGSOB.GLOBAL_NAME
FROM	$$STGDB.ST_OM_GL_SETS_OF_BOOKS SOGSOB
			UNION
			SELECT	EXMGSB.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,EXMGSB.GLOBAL_NAME
FROM	$$EXCEPDB.EX_MF_OM_GL_SETS_OF_BOOKS EXMGSB)
	AND	NSOBT.END_TV_DT = 16000101
	)TVINPUT
	QUALIFY	ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,TVINPUT.START_TV_DT
	ORDER	BY TVINPUT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME DESC) =1
)TVOUTPUT LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS_TV NSOBTV
	ON	TVOUTPUT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOBTV.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND	NSOBTV.END_TV_DT = 16000101
WHERE	ROW_NUM = 1

SELECT 

MFOM_SOB.LEDGER_ID, MFOM_SOB.NAME, MFOM_SOB.SHORT_NAME, MFOM_SOB.LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE, MFOM_SOB.ALC_LEDGER_TYPE_CODE, 
MFOM_SOB.OBJECT_TYPE_CODE, MFOM_SOB.LE_LEDGER_TYPE_CODE, MFOM_SOB.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID, MFOM_SOB.CURRENCY_CODE, 
MFOM_SOB.PERIOD_SET_NAME, MFOM_SOB.ACCOUNTED_PERIOD_TYPE, MFOM_SOB.FIRST_LEDGER_PERIOD_NAME, MFOM_SOB.RET_EARN_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, 
MFOM_SOB.SUSPENSE_ALLOWED_FLAG, MFOM_SOB.ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY_POST_FLAG, MFOM_SOB.TRACK_ROUNDING_IMBALANCE_FLAG, 
MFOM_SOB.ENABLE_AVERAGE_BALANCES_FLAG, MFOM_SOB.ENABLE_BUDGETARY_CONTROL_FLAG, MFOM_SOB.REQUIRE_BUDGET_JOURNALS_FLAG, 
MFOM_SOB.ENABLE_JE_APPROVAL_FLAG, MFOM_SOB.ENABLE_AUTOMATIC_TAX_FLAG, MFOM_SOB.CONSOLIDATION_LEDGER_FLAG, MFOM_SOB.TRANSLATE_EOD_FLAG, 
MFOM_SOB.TRANSLATE_QATD_FLAG, MFOM_SOB.TRANSLATE_YATD_FLAG, MFOM_SOB.AUTOMATICALLY_CREATED_FLAG, MFOM_SOB.BAL_SEG_VALUE_OPTION_CODE, 
MFOM_SOB.BAL_SEG_COLUMN_NAME, MFOM_SOB.MGT_SEG_VALUE_OPTION_CODE, MFOM_SOB.BAL_SEG_VALUE_SET_ID, MFOM_SOB.FUTURE_ENTERABLE_PERIODS_LIMIT, 
MFOM_SOB.LEDGER_ATTRIBUTES, MFOM_SOB.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, MFOM_SOB.LAST_UPDATED_BY, MFOM_SOB.CREATION_DATE, MFOM_SOB.CREATED_BY, 
MFOM_SOB.ENABLE_RECONCILIATION_FLAG, MFOM_SOB.CREATE_JE_FLAG, MFOM_SOB.NET_CLOSING_BAL_FLAG, MFOM_SOB.DESCRIPTION, MFOM_SOB.COMPLETION_STATUS_CODE,
 MFOM_SOB.CONFIGURATION_ID, MFOM_SOB.CUM_TRANS_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, MFOM_SOB.RES_ENCUMB_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, 
 MFOM_SOB.NET_INCOME_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, MFOM_SOB.ROUNDING_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, MFOM_SOB.TRANSACTION_CALENDAR_ID, 
 MFOM_SOB.DAILY_TRANSLATION_RATE_TYPE, MFOM_SOB.MGT_SEG_COLUMN_NAME, MFOM_SOB.MGT_SEG_VALUE_SET_ID, MFOM_SOB.IMPLICIT_ACCESS_SET_ID, 
 MFOM_SOB.CRITERIA_SET_ID, MFOM_SOB.IMPLICIT_LEDGER_SET_ID, MFOM_SOB.LATEST_OPENED_PERIOD_NAME, MFOM_SOB.LATEST_ENCUMBRANCE_YEAR, 
 MFOM_SOB.PERIOD_AVERAGE_RATE_TYPE, MFOM_SOB.PERIOD_END_RATE_TYPE, MFOM_SOB.BUDGET_PERIOD_AVG_RATE_TYPE, MFOM_SOB.BUDGET_PERIOD_END_RATE_TYPE, 
 MFOM_SOB.SLA_ACCOUNTING_METHOD_CODE, MFOM_SOB.SLA_ACCOUNTING_METHOD_TYPE, MFOM_SOB.SLA_DESCRIPTION_LANGUAGE,  MFOM_SOB.SLA_ENTERED_CUR_BAL_SUS_CCID, MFOM_SOB.SLA_SEQUENCING_FLAG, MFOM_SOB.SLA_BAL_BY_LEDGER_CURR_FLAG, MFOM_SOB.SLA_LEDGER_CUR_BAL_SUS_CCID, 
 MFOM_SOB.ENABLE_SECONDARY_TRACK_FLAG, MFOM_SOB.ENABLE_REVAL_SS_TRACK_FLAG, MFOM_SOB.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, MFOM_SOB.CONTEXT, MFOM_SOB.ATTRIBUTE1, 
 MFOM_SOB.ATTRIBUTE2, MFOM_SOB.ATTRIBUTE3, MFOM_SOB.ATTRIBUTE4, MFOM_SOB.ATTRIBUTE5, MFOM_SOB.ATTRIBUTE6, MFOM_SOB.ATTRIBUTE7, MFOM_SOB.ATTRIBUTE8, 
 MFOM_SOB.ATTRIBUTE9, MFOM_SOB.ATTRIBUTE10, MFOM_SOB.ATTRIBUTE11, MFOM_SOB.ATTRIBUTE12, MFOM_SOB.ATTRIBUTE13, MFOM_SOB.ATTRIBUTE14, MFOM_SOB.ATTRIBUTE15, MFOM_SOB.SLA_LEDGER_CASH_BASIS_FLAG, MFOM_SOB.COMPLETE_FLAG, MFOM_SOB.COMMITMENT_BUDGET_FLAG,  MFOM_SOB.AUTOMATE_SEC_JRNL_REV_FLAG, MFOM_SOB.GES_UPDATE_DATE, MFOM_SOB.GLOBAL_NAME, MFOM_SOB.BATCH_ID, MFOM_SOB.CREATE_DATETIME, 
 MFOM_SOB.ACTION_CODE 

FROM (

SELECT 

SCGL.LEDGER_ID, SCGL.NAME, SCGL.SHORT_NAME, SCGL.LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE, SCGL.ALC_LEDGER_TYPE_CODE, SCGL.OBJECT_TYPE_CODE, SCGL.LE_LEDGER_TYPE_CODE, 
SCGL.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID, SCGL.CURRENCY_CODE, SCGL.PERIOD_SET_NAME, SCGL.ACCOUNTED_PERIOD_TYPE, SCGL.FIRST_LEDGER_PERIOD_NAME, 
SCGL.RET_EARN_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, SCGL.SUSPENSE_ALLOWED_FLAG, SCGL.ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY_POST_FLAG, SCGL.TRACK_ROUNDING_IMBALANCE_FLAG, 
SCGL.ENABLE_AVERAGE_BALANCES_FLAG, SCGL.ENABLE_BUDGETARY_CONTROL_FLAG, SCGL.REQUIRE_BUDGET_JOURNALS_FLAG, SCGL.ENABLE_JE_APPROVAL_FLAG, 
SCGL.ENABLE_AUTOMATIC_TAX_FLAG, SCGL.CONSOLIDATION_LEDGER_FLAG, SCGL.TRANSLATE_EOD_FLAG, SCGL.TRANSLATE_QATD_FLAG, SCGL.TRANSLATE_YATD_FLAG, 
SCGL.AUTOMATICALLY_CREATED_FLAG, SCGL.BAL_SEG_VALUE_OPTION_CODE, SCGL.BAL_SEG_COLUMN_NAME, SCGL.MGT_SEG_VALUE_OPTION_CODE, 
SCGL.BAL_SEG_VALUE_SET_ID, SCGL.FUTURE_ENTERABLE_PERIODS_LIMIT, SCGL.LEDGER_ATTRIBUTES, SCGL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, SCGL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
SCGL.CREATION_DATE, SCGL.CREATED_BY, SCGL.ENABLE_RECONCILIATION_FLAG, SCGL.CREATE_JE_FLAG, SCGL.NET_CLOSING_BAL_FLAG, SCGL.DESCRIPTION, 
SCGL.COMPLETION_STATUS_CODE, SCGL.CONFIGURATION_ID, SCGL.CUM_TRANS_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, SCGL.RES_ENCUMB_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, 
SCGL.NET_INCOME_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, SCGL.ROUNDING_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, SCGL.TRANSACTION_CALENDAR_ID, SCGL.DAILY_TRANSLATION_RATE_TYPE, 
SCGL.MGT_SEG_COLUMN_NAME, SCGL.MGT_SEG_VALUE_SET_ID, SCGL.IMPLICIT_ACCESS_SET_ID, SCGL.CRITERIA_SET_ID, SCGL.IMPLICIT_LEDGER_SET_ID, 
SCGL.LATEST_OPENED_PERIOD_NAME, SCGL.LATEST_ENCUMBRANCE_YEAR, SCGL.PERIOD_AVERAGE_RATE_TYPE, SCGL.PERIOD_END_RATE_TYPE, 
SCGL.BUDGET_PERIOD_AVG_RATE_TYPE, SCGL.BUDGET_PERIOD_END_RATE_TYPE, SCGL.SLA_ACCOUNTING_METHOD_CODE, SCGL.SLA_ACCOUNTING_METHOD_TYPE, 
SCGL.SLA_DESCRIPTION_LANGUAGE, SCGL.SLA_ENTERED_CUR_BAL_SUS_CCID, SCGL.SLA_SEQUENCING_FLAG, SCGL.SLA_BAL_BY_LEDGER_CURR_FLAG, 
SCGL.SLA_LEDGER_CUR_BAL_SUS_CCID, SCGL.ENABLE_SECONDARY_TRACK_FLAG, SCGL.ENABLE_REVAL_SS_TRACK_FLAG, SCGL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, SCGL.CONTEXT, 
SCGL.ATTRIBUTE1, SCGL.ATTRIBUTE2, SCGL.ATTRIBUTE3, SCGL.ATTRIBUTE4, SCGL.ATTRIBUTE5, SCGL.ATTRIBUTE6, SCGL.ATTRIBUTE7, SCGL.ATTRIBUTE8, SCGL.ATTRIBUTE9, 
SCGL.ATTRIBUTE10, SCGL.ATTRIBUTE11, SCGL.ATTRIBUTE12, SCGL.ATTRIBUTE13, SCGL.ATTRIBUTE14, SCGL.ATTRIBUTE15, SCGL.SLA_LEDGER_CASH_BASIS_FLAG, 
SCGL.COMPLETE_FLAG, SCGL.COMMITMENT_BUDGET_FLAG, SCGL.AUTOMATE_SEC_JRNL_REV_FLAG, SCGL.GES_UPDATE_DATE, SCGL.GLOBAL_NAME, SCGL.BATCH_ID, 
SCGL.CREATE_DATETIME, SCGL.ACTION_CODE, 
			
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
			CASE
         			When ELGLR.TARGET_LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE ='PRIMARY'
         			            THEN 'P'
		            WHEN ELGLR.TARGET_LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE  IN ('SECONDARY','ALC')
         			             THEN 'R'
		            WHEN ELGLR.TARGET_LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE ='NONE'
			                     THEN 'N'
		     END MRC_SOB_TYPE_CODE	
 /* COALESCE (SCGL.ATTRIBUTE1,'N')  as ATTRIBUTE1*/
	FROM
	$$STGDB.ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS SCGL,
	$$ETLVWDB.EL_GL_LEDGER_RELATIONSHIPS ELGLR 
  	WHERE 
	         SCGL.LEDGER_ID = ELGLR.PRIMARY_LEDGER_ID
			 AND  SCGL.GLOBAL_NAME=ELGLR.GLOBAL_NAME
                          AND  SCGL.NAME=ELGLR.TARGET_LEDGER_NAME 
                           AND  ELGLR.RELATIONSHIP_TYPE_CODE <>'ALC' 
) MFOM_SOB
			   
	
WHERE	(
	NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV NICTV
		WHERE MFOM_SOB.CURRENCY_CODE = NICTV.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE
		  AND NICTV.END_TV_DATE=16000101)
	OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS NCOA
		WHERE MFOM_SOB.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID = NCOA.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT)
	OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		WHERE MFOM_SOB.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
	)
